name: One-skillet: Pork Cashew Stir Fry
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 5 minutes
1. Heat vegetable oil in a wok or heavy skillet over high heat. Cut pork tenderloin into 1/2-inch strips and add to the wok. Stir fry for 3 to 4 minutes, or until lightly browned.
2. Add soy sauce; stir fry for 1 minute. Reduce heat to medium and add carrots. Cover and cook for 3 minutes.
3. Add green peppers and cashews; stir fry for 3 to 4 minutes. Sprinkle with brown sugar and stir until dissolved, about 1 minute.
4. Dissolve cornstarch in water. Add the mixture to the wok. Stir and cook until sauce thickens and clears. Season with salt to taste.
5. Serve immediately with rice.
